data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for two-way SMS, which allows customers to reply to messages to confirm, cancel, or reschedule appointments. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate the implementation of this functionality. The provided scenarios in the use case outline potential messages but do not confirm that the system can handle customer replies, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of two-way SMS functionality allowing customer replies.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
